title: Events Assistants / Equipment Organizer $15/hr freelancer with early morning transport reimbursement
description:
Apply: hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg

Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg (do not only apply via this portal)

Events Assistants / Helpers / Equipment Organizer / IC

The leading sports events company in Singapore, Ministry of Football Pte Ltd, is seeking to hire many Sports Events Assistants

The Sports Events Assistants is responsible for

  • Collecting equipment from our office
  • Travel to our customer venue and set up equipment (such as bubbleball, kinball, football, tchoukball etc etc)
  • Brief cleaning of our equipment before the program
  • Supervise the program while our qualified Coaches conduct the activity
  • After the program retrieve all equipment, basic quick cleaning after the program, and travel back to our office.

You will be hired as an independent contractor. Your hourly fee is typically $12/hour (at least) - more if you are able to undertake as a solo IC, and will a typical program is 4-5 hours, and will start from the time u arrive at our office, until you fall out from the program (either from the venue or our office – depending on our requirements).


We have many many sports, do check us out: www.ministryofsports.com.sg


This role is a great way to earn a good income, flexible hours (only when you are available), and have a good introduction to all the various sports in Singapore. We pay $15/hr freelancer with early morning transport reimbursement.


When you apply, please ensure you talk about how much you have/do not have on each of the skills, apps, programs, software etc mentioned above.


Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg (do not only apply via this portal).


(please do not call or whatsapp, as our phone lines do not handle employment, only our email application process).

postedCompany.description:
MOF IS SINGAPORE’S TOP 11-A-SIDE FOOTBALL LEAGUES, CUPS & COMPETITIONS ORGANIZER!

Well-organized and co-ordinated: no venue mix-ups or miscommunication
Deliver what we promise: weekly games are weekly games, no gaps (save for postponements)
Easily reachable and responsive hotlines
Professional and clear in our communication
Well-covered by photographers to highlight your football journey
Prepares for contingencies, such as standby referees etc. 
Fast & efficient in dealing with problems
Happy to hear feedback with humility
Firm in the enforcement of rules & regulations (afterall football is a sport), but fair in making judgments

See all our brands
